personalInfo.name: Your Name
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer Enthusiast
personalInfo.bio: Passionate developer with expertise in modern web technologies and growing interest in AI engineering. I love building scalable applications and exploring the intersection of traditional development with artificial intelligence.

experience.summary: Experienced full stack developer with a track record of delivering robust web applications. Currently expanding into AI engineering to build intelligent solutions that combine traditional web development with cutting-edge machine learning capabilities.
highlights: Built 20+ production applications serving thousands of users
Led development teams in agile environments
Specialized in React, Node.js, and cloud architecture
Currently learning AI/ML technologies including TensorFlow and LangChain

workExperience.description: Led development of enterprise web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and cloud technologies.
achievements: Reduced application load time by 40% through optimization
Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews
Implemented CI/CD pipelines that reduced deployment time by 60%

workExperience.description: Developed and maintained web applications for various clients, focusing on performance and user experience.
achievements: Built responsive web applications with 99.9% uptime
Integrated third-party APIs and payment systems
Collaborated with UX team to improve user engagement by 25%

workExperience.description: Provided web development services to small businesses and startups, delivering custom solutions tailored to their needs.
achievements: Delivered projects on time and within budget

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Modern e-commerce solution with real-time inventory management and AI-powered recommendations.

details.problem: Small businesses needed an affordable, scalable e-commerce solution
details.solution: Built a headless e-commerce platform with modular architecture
challenges: Implementing real-time inventory across multiple locations

projects.name: Task Management Dashboard
projects.description: Collaborative project management tool with real-time updates and AI-powered task prioritization.

details.problem: Teams needed better visibility and coordination in remote work
details.solution: Created a real-time dashboard with drag-and-drop functionality
